name: sk-design
description: Design-family parent hub: the single advisor-routable home for distinctive, intentional UI design and the full design surface. Routes any design query to five modes via mode-registry.json — interface (visual direction, taste, and interface build judgment), foundations (color, typography, layout, spacing, hierarchy, design tokens, theming), motion (animation, transitions, micro-interactions, reduced motion), audit (accessibility, performance, responsive, anti-slop detection, design quality scoring), and md-generator (extract a live site's real CSS into a v3 Style Reference DESIGN.md via an embedded Playwright pipeline). The hub holds no per-mode logic; each mode keeps its own contract and cites the shared design reference base.
trigger_examples: make this landing page look less templated
build an OKLCH color token system with dark mode
set a typographic scale and spacing system
animate the menu with a reduced-motion fallback
audit this UI for accessibility and anti-slop issues
score the design quality and list P0/P1 findings
extract a design system from a live website into DESIGN.md
capture a site's real CSS tokens as a Style Reference
